hero.title: Decentralized finance is for everyone
hero.subtitle1: Defied enables you to generate yield on your digital euro and dollars, providing secure and decentralized access to DeFi

imageSection.heading: DeFi yield without the complexity, banks, or intermediaries.

carousel.step1Desc: No need to understand wallets or keys. We create a wallet for you automatically.
carousel.step2Desc: We select low-risk protocols with high liquidity and generate yield for you.
carousel.step3Desc: We have no access to your funds. Smart contracts are public and verifiable.

aboutCarousel.title: How it works
aboutCarousel.card1Desc: You don't need to understand how digital wallets and private keys work. We offer an easy-to-use interface and registration with just an email address.
aboutCarousel.card2Desc: We have no access to your funds. You are the only one who controls your wallet. All smart contracts are non-custodial.
aboutCarousel.card3Desc: No need to research DeFi protocols yourself. We select the lowest-risk options with high liquidity and generate yield for you.
aboutCarousel.card4Desc: Buy cryptocurrency with a card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, or via SEPA bank transfer. You can also deposit crypto directly into your account.

faq.title: Questions?
faq.subtitle: Answers.
faq.a1: Defied is a platform that provides non-custodial decentralized infrastructure for easy access to DeFi. Register with an email and automatically receive a wallet.
faq.a2: Only you. The smart contracts are non-custodial — neither Defied nor Privy have access to your private key. It is stored locally on your device.
faq.a3: Your funds are deposited into curated DeFi protocols with high liquidity through our smart contracts. Yield comes directly from the protocol, without an intermediary.
faq.q4: What are the advantages over a bank?
faq.a4: Full transparency through public smart contracts, higher yield from DeFi protocols, no intermediary, and full control over your assets at all times.
faq.q5: Can I withdraw my money at any time?
faq.a5: Yes — there is no lock-up period on our part. Withdrawal depends only on the liquidity of the respective decentralized protocol.
faq.a6: You can buy stablecoins directly on the platform with a debit/credit card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, or SEPA bank transfer — through our licensed partner MoonPay.

trade.title: Trade Crypto
trade.subtitle: Buy crypto with a card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, or SEPA bank transfer.
trade.loginRequiredDesc: To buy crypto, you need to log in to your account first.
trade.buyCryptoDesc: Buy cryptocurrency with a card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, or SEPA bank transfer.
trade.sellCryptoDesc: Sell cryptocurrency and receive funds to your card or bank account.
